situations: You are in a grocery store. The learner wants to buy fish.
The learner is looking for rice.
The learner wants to ask if food is halal.
The learner's child has a fever.
The learner wants to ask for a female doctor.
The learner wants to go to the hospital.
The learner asks about the next stop.
The learner asks the driver to wait because of a stroller.
The learner wants to order a chicken and rice dish.
The learner wants to ask if the meat is halal.
The learner wants to know how their child is doing in class.
The learner needs to explain that their child is sick and will be absent.
The learner is asking when the school finishes today.
The learner is lost and needs directions to the train station.
The learner lost their wallet and needs to report it.
The learner is asking for help to find a specific building.
